annotations.notes: Both gate and down projections are an incoherent mix of proper nouns, word fragments, and different languages.
Gate push has a weak but noticeable theme of code and markup closing tokens like '' and ']]]]'.
Down-push has a clear theme of programming-related tokens ('finalText', 'LastError', 'SourceName') and code delimiters.
Both projections are a jumble of multilingual tokens and fragments with no discernible theme.
The suppression weights are highly coherent, strongly pushing against 'background', 'music', and 'interface' tokens.
Gate push includes the critical '<|tool|>' token, making it unsafe to overwrite.
Gate push is highly coherent, focusing on programming concepts like 'raw', 'rawValue', 'control', and 'attribute'.
Appears to be an incoherent mix of multilingual tokens and code-like symbols with no clear function.
Gate has a slight lean towards affect-related words but is mostly noise; down is an incoherent mix.
Gate has a weak theme of 'any'/'anyone' and 'reveal' across English, Spanish, and Indonesian.
Down-push has a clear theme related to 'radius' and 'distance' ('Radi', 'Radius', 'dist', 'radii').
Both gate and down projections are a multilingual, themeless collection of tokens.
Down-push has a weak theme of expansion ('expanded', 'Expanded', 'erweit').
Gate push is clearly themed around closing brackets and HTML/XML-like tag closers ('">', '>', ']}').
Gate has a very faint 'cool' theme but is mostly noise; down is an incoherent mix of tokens.
Down-push is clearly functional, consisting almost entirely of various code brackets, pipes, and symbols.
Gate has a theme of Indonesian/Malay words; down has a theme of simple adjectives like 'Bad'/'bad' and 'Worth'.
Both projections appear to be a random assortment of tokens with no connecting theme.

Extremely coherent neuron focused on the concept of checking and updating, in both gate and down projections.
Gate push is highly coherent around the concept of 'new' across English, Spanish/Portuguese, and German.

Gate push has a noticeable theme of code and markup tokens like '<code>', '{@', and '/*'.
Gate push has a clear theme related to data processing and errors ('DataReader', 'ErrorReport', 'sendLog').
Weak but noticeable themes in both gate (config) and down (async, parseInt, purchased) projections.

Gate push has a clear semantic theme of negative adjectives (unpredictable, uncontrolled, unsound).
Gate is an incoherent mix of languages and code; down has a very weak 'open' theme but is mostly noise.
Both projections are a random assortment of proper nouns, code tokens, and multilingual fragments.
Down-push has a weak but clear theme of file operations ('FileName', 'DeleteItem', 'AndDelete').
Gate and down have faint, unrelated hints of themes ('Intro', 'verbose') but are dominated by noise.

Down-push has a weak but clear theme around 'Establishing' and 'Encounter'.

Both projections are a random mix of multilingual tokens, proper names, and word fragments.
Gate has a very weak 'scr'/'scop' theme and down has a weak 'porn' theme, but both are mostly noise.
Gate has a clear theme of JSON ('fromJson') and code punctuation ('?}', '()}\'); down is also themed.
Gate push has a clear theme related to resources ('resource', 'Resource') and process flow ('leads', 'Proceed').
Down-push has a clear theme of 'departments' and another of 'few'/'isn't'/'aren't'.
